channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Karol G reveals warnings against criticising ICE due to US visa concerns ahead of Coachella headline slot

item.description: Moody’s Investors Service has revised its outlook for U.S. Business Development Companies (BDCs) from 'stable' to 'negative,' signaling growing concern about the financial health of firms that lend to...

item.title: Antonia Romeo appointed to lead civil service reforms and deliver Prime Minister’s agenda
item.description: Antonia Romeo, now Keir Starmer’s most senior civil servant as cabinet secretary and head of the civil service, has been entrusted with a significant mandate to advance the Prime Minister’s priorities...

item.title: Artemis II Crew Observes Historic Moon Fly-By and Makes Groundbreaking Discoveries
item.description: On April 6, 2026, the Artemis II crew achieved a historic moment as they became the first humans to observe parts of the Moon's far side by eye. The crew's mission included making groundbreaking obser...

item.title: Adani Group Faces Dismissal Bid in U.S. SEC Fraud Case

item.title: US Journalist Shelly Kittleson Freed After Kidnapping by Militia in Baghdad
item.description: Shelly Kittleson, a 49-year-old US journalist, has been released after being kidnapped in Baghdad on March 31. She was freed on Tuesday by the Iran-backed militia, Kataib Hezbollah, which had abducted...

item.title: Todd Blanche, Acting US Attorney General, Defends Trump’s Right to Investigate Political Opponents

item.title: Trump Issues Stark Warnings to Iran Amid Escalating Tensions
item.description: As tension dey rise between America and Iran, President Donald Trump don drop heavy-heavy warning say if Iran no listen to wetin him demand, whole civilization go die. Since February 28, American and ...

item.description: Mamelodi Sundowns and Orlando Pirates continue their tight race for the Betway Premiership title, with both teams securing victories in Tuesday's matches. Pirates delivered an impressive 5-0 thrashing...

item.title: Police arrest man for P2.6M jewelry theft in Manila home
item.description: A suspect was arrested in Manila after reportedly breaking into a residence and stealing jewelry estimated to be worth ₱2.6 million. According to police reports, the man entered the home by climbing o...

item.title: Melissa Gilbert defends husband Timothy Busfield amid child sexual contact charges
item.description: Actress Melissa Gilbert has publicly voiced her full support for her husband, actor and director Timothy Busfield, who faces four counts of criminal sexual contact with a child in New Mexico. Speaking...

item.title: Women Football Fans Demand Safer and More Inclusive Stadiums
item.description: Women football supporters in the UK have long faced sexism and misogyny in the sport, with research showing that three-quarters of male fans hold misogynistic attitudes. Incidents of sexism at matches...

item.title: The Mystery of Silphium: How an Ancient Roman Plant Went Extinct
item.description: Silphium, an extinct plant that once thrived in modern-day Libya, was highly valued by the Ancient Romans for its various uses. Described as an aphrodisiac, contraceptive, and abortion-inducing herb, ...

item.title: Nairobi Mother Discovers Child’s Father Faked Death to Avoid Support Payments
item.description: A Nairobi mother, Lynne, has shared her shocking story about how her child's father allegedly faked his own death to avoid paying child support. She met him in 2014 and gave birth to their son in 2015...
